claim_description: Residential property sustained roof damage from hailstorm on 03/15. Independent adjuster confirmed Class 4 impact damage to 22 squares of architectural shingles, gutters dented, and 3 skylights cracked.
expected_determination: Covered peril under HO-3 open-perils dwelling coverage. Approve roof replacement, gutter repair, and skylight replacement less $2,500 wind/hail deductible. Estimated payout: $18,400.

claim_description: Claimant reports total theft of 2024 Porsche 911 Turbo S from enclosed garage. No signs of forced entry. Vehicle had aftermarket GPS tracker which was disabled 2 hours before reported theft. Claimant filed for bankruptcy 3 months ago.
expected_determination: Refer to Special Investigations Unit. Multiple red flags: no forced entry, GPS disabled pre-theft, recent financial distress. Assign SIU investigator, request EUO under policy cooperation clause, obtain financial records.

claim_description: Workers compensation claim for lumbar disc herniation at L4-L5. Employee reports injury occurred while lifting 80-lb inventory box. Employer confirms incident witnessed by supervisor. MRI confirms disc herniation consistent with acute trauma.
expected_determination: Accept claim as compensable. Authorize initial treatment plan including physical therapy and pain management. TTD benefits at 66.67% of AWW. Assign nurse case manager for return-to-work coordination.

claim_description: Commercial property water damage claim. Policyholder reports burst pipe caused flooding in 3,000 sq ft warehouse. Claims $340,000 in inventory loss. Policy was purchased 18 days before the reported loss. No prior insurance history for this business.
expected_determination: Flag for investigation due to policy inception proximity to loss. Verify inventory records against tax filings and purchase orders. Request proof of loss under oath. Engage forensic accountant to validate inventory valuation.

claim_description: Auto collision claim: insured rear-ended at stoplight by uninsured motorist. Police report filed. Insured sustained cervical strain, vehicle has $6,200 in rear-end damage per certified repair estimate.
expected_determination: Approve collision claim less $500 deductible for vehicle repair. Open UM/UIM bodily injury claim. Authorize initial chiropractic and orthopedic evaluation. Subrogate against at-fault uninsured driver.

claim_description: Professional liability claim against architectural firm. Client alleges structural design defect caused foundation cracking in commercial building 14 months post-construction. Estimated remediation cost: $2.1M.
expected_determination: Acknowledge claim under claims-made policy, verify claim falls within policy period and retroactive date. Assign panel defense counsel. Retain independent structural engineer for liability assessment. Reserve at $1.5M pending investigation.

claim_description: Life insurance claim on $2M term policy. Insured died 23 months into policy term. Cause of death listed as hepatocellular carcinoma. Application disclosed no pre-existing conditions. Medical records subpoena reveals hepatitis C diagnosis 4 years prior to application.
expected_determination: Deny claim based on material misrepresentation during underwriting within contestability period (death occurred within 2-year contestable period). Rescind policy and refund premiums paid. Claimant may dispute through policy grievance process.

claim_description: Homeowners liability claim: mail carrier slipped on unshoveled icy walkway, fractured left wrist and dislocated shoulder. Claimant attorney demands $125,000. Local ordinance requires snow removal within 24 hours of snowfall.
expected_determination: Coverage applies under Section II personal liability. Insured likely negligent for failure to comply with snow removal ordinance. Assign defense counsel, authorize medical records review, evaluate settlement in $60,000-$85,000 range given clear liability and moderate injuries.

claim_description: Cyber liability claim: mid-size accounting firm experienced ransomware attack encrypting all client tax records during peak filing season. Ransom demand of $500,000 in Bitcoin. Firm estimates $1.2M in business interruption losses.
policy_type: Cyber Liability - First and Third Party
expected_determination: Activate incident response team per policy provisions. Engage approved breach counsel and forensic IT vendor. First-party coverage applies to business interruption, data restoration, and ransom payment (if legal). Assess regulatory notification obligations under state breach notification laws.

claim_description: Disability insurance claim for orthopedic surgeon claiming total disability due to bilateral carpal tunnel syndrome. Claimant's social media shows recent posts of recreational rock climbing and home renovation projects.
expected_determination: Refer to SIU for surveillance. Social media evidence contradicts claimed functional limitations. Under own-occupation definition, assess whether claimant can perform material duties of their specific surgical specialty. Request IME with hand surgery specialist.

claim_description: Commercial general liability claim: restaurant patron alleges severe allergic reaction to undisclosed peanut oil in menu item. Hospitalized for 3 days with anaphylaxis. Menu did not contain allergen warnings.
expected_determination: Coverage applies under products-completed operations. Significant liability exposure due to failure to disclose allergen. Assign defense counsel, obtain medical records, review restaurant allergen disclosure policies. Evaluate early mediation given strong plaintiff position. Reserve at $250,000.
